zh.Holgate, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾霍爾蓋特
zh.Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Mauduit I於大約1158年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普時，他的父親William de Mauduit II68歲，母親Maude Hanslape81歲。他於1180年與Agnes Mare在英國史洛普爾霍爾蓋特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1191年在英國維爾爾瓦明斯特享年34歲。

zh-hans.Holgate, Shropshire, England: 英国史洛普爾霍爾蓋特
zh-hans.Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Mauduit I于大约1158年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普时，他的父亲William de Mauduit II68岁，母亲Maude Hanslape81岁。他于1180年与Agnes Mare在英国史洛普爾霍爾蓋特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1191年在英国維爾爾瓦明斯特享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mauduit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mawditt
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French mal-duit ‘badly brought up, ill educated’ (Latin male doctus).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Mauduit I was born about 1158, in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Mauduit II, was 68 and his mother, Maude Hanslape, was 81. He married Agnes Mare in 1180, in Holdgate, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1191, in Warminster, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Mauduit I est né environ 1158, à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Mauduit II, avait 68 ans et sa mère, Maude Hanslape, avait 81 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Mare en 1180, à Holdgate, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1191, à Warminster, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Mauduit I um 1158 in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Mauduit II 68 und seine Mutter Maude Hanslape 81. Er hat 1180 in Holdgate, Shropshire, England Agnes Mare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1191 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Warminster, Wiltshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Mauduit I è nato il circa 1158 nel Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Mauduit II, aveva 68 anni e il suo madre, Maude Hanslape, aveva 81 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Mare nel 1180, nel Holdgate, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1191, nel Warminster, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.Warminster, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアワーミンスター
ja.Holgate, Shropshire, England: イギリスシュロプシュアイアホールドガト
ja.Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンスロペ
ja.lifeSummary: Robert Mauduit Iが約1158年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンスロペで生まれた時，父William de Mauduit IIは68歳，母Maude Hanslapeは81歳であった。1180年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアホールドガトでAgnes Mareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1191年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアワーミンスターで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Mauduit I(이)가 대략 1158년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Mauduit II(은)는 68세였고, 그의 어머니 Maude Hanslape(은)는 81세였다. 그는 1180년 영국 슈럽실르 홀드가트에서 Agnes Mare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1191년 영국 윌츠히르 워민스터에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Mauduit I nasceu aproximadamente 1158, em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Mauduit II, tinha 68 anos e sua mãe, Maude Hanslape, tinha 81 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Mare em 1180, em Holdgate, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1191, em Warminster, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Mauduit I родился около 1158 г. в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Mauduit II было 68 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude Hanslape, 81. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Mare в 1180 г. в местности холджэит, шропшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1191 г. в местности варминстир, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Mauduit I nació aproximadamente 1158, en Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Mauduit II, tenía 68 años y su mamá, Maude Hanslape, tenía 81 años. Se casó con Agnes Mare en 1180, en Holdgate, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1191, en Warminster, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años.
